## Entry

## Which file does it belong in

- [ ] `words.txt` ‚Äî standard dictionary vocabulary
- [ ] `names.txt` ‚Äî personal name, surname, or honorific title
- [ ] `modern.txt` ‚Äî slang, informal register, loanword, trending term
- [ ] `variants.txt` ‚Äî misspelling ‚Üí canonical mapping (deprecated
      orthography or clear error, **not** an accepted spelling double like
      ·üí·ûè/·üí·ûä)
